data.title: Tony Collichio of Spencerport, NY, named "Mr. Work Van" by HelloNation for his expertise in van upfitting; shares tips on saving time in a new article.
data.description: In Spencerport, New York, on January 22, 2026, a recent article from HelloNation offers valuable insights on optimizing a work van upfit to enhance efficiency for tradespeople. The piece draws from the expertise of Tony Collichio, also known as Mr. Work, providing practical steps based on real-world experience. This guide aims to help tradespeople save time at every stop, ultimately improving productivity. Collichio's insights can assist professionals in effectively setting up their work vans, potentially leading to significant time savings during their daily operations.

Russia's Roscosmos cosmonaut Sergei Kud-Sverchkov captured shimmering aurora lights over Earth from the ISS amid the strongest solar storm in 20 years. "Sailing inside the red glow!" he posted. Solar particles collide with the atmosphere for this epic show.

data.title: Wisconsin Electric to pay 90 cents per share dividend on Preferred Stock, 3.60% Series, to stockholders on Feb. 13, 2026.
data.description: In Milwaukee, on January 22, 2026, the board of directors at Wisconsin Electric announced a quarterly cash dividend of 90 cents per share for the company's Preferred Stock, 3.60% Series. This dividend is set to be paid out on March 1, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of February 13, 2026. Additionally, the board also approved...

data.title: Massachusetts ranks 4th in FAFSA completion with 43.2% of the high school class of 2026 having submitted for 2026-27.
data.description: In Boston, Massachusetts, recent data from the National College Attainment Network shows that the state is in the top five nationwide for FAFSA completion for the 2025-2026 academic year. This achievement highlights the high level of participation in federal financial aid within the state. A notable 43.2% of the high school class of 2026 in Massachusetts have already submitted their FAFSA for the upcoming 2026-27 academic year.

data.title: Pinegrove Opportunity Partners raises $2.2 billion for inaugural fund, investing in private tech companies.
data.description: Pinegrove Opportunity Partners ("POP"), based in San Francisco, revealed on January 22, 2026, their recent completion of funding for investing in private technology companies that lead their respective categories. As a venture and growth secondaries investor, POP offers scalable and tailored solutions for these investments.

data.title: Salt River Project selects ISNetworld to improve contractor safety standards; SRP aims for operational consistency and compliance.
data.description: ISN, a prominent provider of contractor and supplier information management services on a global scale, recently disclosed that Salt River Project (SRP), a major electricity and water provider in Arizona, has opted for ISNetworld as its main platform for managing contractor safety information. This decision aims to enable SRP to establish consistent safety management procedures for contractors through the assistance of ISN, thus enhancing operational uniformity and compliance throughout its operations. SRP's dedication to safety is crucial to their operational ethos, and this alliance with ISN underscores their commitment to maintaining high safety standards.

data.title: Health insurance expert David Wiley from Watkinsville, GA, discusses ACA protections and key enrollment dates.
data.description: In a recent article published on Jan. 22, 2026, in HelloNation, insights on health insurance enrollment were provided by licensed insurance agent David Wiley from Watkinsville, Georgia. Key dates and terms essential to understand during the enrollment process were discussed. The article aimed to simplify the complexities surrounding health insurance enrollment, assisting individuals in making informed decisions. With David Wiley's expertise in the field, valuable information was shared to guide readers through the enrollment procedure effectively.

data.title: Red Pine Exploration announces AGM results: Jan 21, 2026. Shareholders re-elected 6 directors, reappointed auditors, approved change of name.
data.description: Red Pine Exploration Inc. (TSXV: RPX, OTCQB: RDEXF) held its annual and special meeting of shareholders on January 21, 2026. During the meeting, shareholders re-elected Drew Anwyll, Rachel Goldman, Paul Martin, Michael Michaud, Alice Murphy, and Gary O’Connor as directors of the company. MNP LLP, Chartered Accountants, was reappointed as the auditors of the company. Additionally, the shareholders approved the change of the company's name.

data.title: LangChain presents Deep Agents Framework for Multi-Agent AI Systems, integrating subagents and skills primitives to address context overload. Learn more.
data.description: LangChain has introduced Deep Agents equipped with subagents and skills primitives in an effort to address the issue of context bloat within AI systems. These new features aim to improve the efficiency and performance of AI technologies. Developers are encouraged to familiarize themselves with these advancements to stay ahead in the rapidly evolving field. For more detailed information, click on the provided link.

data.title: Partnership between Washington Freedom Cricket, Infinite Computer Solutions, Hood College, and FCC launches exclusive student internship program in Frederick, Md.
data.description: Collaboration Aims to Offer Practical Training for Local Frederick Students FREDERICK, Md., January 21, 2026 - In a recent development, Washington Freedom Cricket and Infinite Computer Solutions have joined forces with Hood College and Frederick Community College (FCC) to provide hands-on professional development opportunities for students in the Frederick area. This partnership is set to benefit a significant number of students and equip them with practical skills essential for their future careers.

data.title: OnePay partners with Rakuten Card Linked Offer Network to provide more rewards to customers in app. New York, Jan 22, 2026.
data.description: OnePay app will soon include Rakuten card-linked offers from leading merchants in a move to simplify the process of earning rewards for customers. This development, announced on January 22, 2026, in New York, will provide users with a greater variety of opportunities to earn rewards without altering their financial management habits. The initiative aims to enhance user experience and facilitate the accumulation of benefits from various transactions.

data.title: Spinal Resources Inc. in FL received a Notice of Allowability from USPTO for its Bezier Parametric Curve Spinal Rod System (US Patent No. 12,251,133) on Jan. 22, 2026, expanding its usage specific to patient anatomy.
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on January 22, 2026, Spinal Resources Inc. announced that they have received a Notice of Allowability from the United States Patent and Trademark Office Inc. This notice expands the potential applications for their Bezier Parametric Curve Spinal Rod System. The system is protected under US Patent No. 12,251,133.

data.title: Ribāṭ University offers affordable and career-aligned degrees for women globally in 2026, founded by Dr. Tamara Gray.
data.description: Established by Dr. Tamara Gray, Ribāṭ University is the sole global university catering to Muslim women. Drawing from a ten-year background in online education for women, the university offers a unique opportunity for female learners. Recently launched in ARDEN HILLS, Minn. on Jan. 22, 2026, Ribāṭ University is set to make an impactful contribution to empowering Muslim women worldwide.

data.title: 326 new homes for sale in exclusive 55+ village, Gavilán Ridge, in Orange County, CA. 5 neighborhoods meet demand for age-qualified living.
data.description: In Orange County, California, Gavilán Ridge stands out as the sole age-qualified new home community available for purchase. It features five distinct neighborhoods developed by renowned builders Del Webb, Lennar, and Tri Pointe Homes, catering to the increasing need for age-qualified living options in the region. The development is part of Rancho Mission Viejo, acknowledged as one of the leading intentional wellness real estate projects in the area.

data.title: Bitcoin struggles around $90,000. Bitcoin at $89,783, Ethereum at $2,948, XRP at $1.92, Dogecoin at $0.1242, Shiba Inu at $0.057842. 120,717 traders liquidated in 24 hours totaling $415.53 million. Spot Bitcoin ETFs saw net outflows of $708.7 million.
data.description: Bitcoin broke its three-day losing streak, marking a 2% increase, yet struggles to reach the $90,000 mark. Current cryptocurrency prices are Bitcoin at $89,783, Ethereum at $2,948, Solana at $127.83, XRP at $1.92, Dogecoin at $0.1242, and Shiba Inu at $0.057842. In the past 24 hours, Coinglass data reports 120,717 traders faced liquidation, resulting in a total of $415.53 million in losses. Additionally, SoSoValue data reveals $708.7 million was withdrawn from spot Bitcoin ETFs, while spot Ethereum ETFs experienced net outflows of $297.5 million on Wednesday. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: SkySlope expands Breeze to Hawaii, offering a seamless disclosure experience to over 900,000 real estate professionals in North America.
data.description: In Sacramento, California on January 22, 2026, SkySlope, a leading transaction management platform utilized by over 900,000 real estate professionals in North America, revealed the extension of its digital disclosure platform, Breeze, to Hawaii. This expansion marks a significant move for the company as it aims to broaden its reach and services to new markets.
